scenes.title: Complex Data Silos
scenes.subtitle: Struggling with fragmented, unclear business data?
scenes.caption: Traditional methods fail to deliver real-time, actionable intelligence.
scenes.veo_action_cue: Show a user looking frustrated at a chaotic, fragmented data dashboard. Quickly transition to a clean, empty canvas or loading screen to signify the shift to a better solution.

scenes.title: Instant Dashboards
scenes.subtitle: Real-time descriptive analytics at your fingertips.
scenes.caption: Get a comprehensive overview of your business health instantly.
scenes.veo_action_cue: Smooth pan right across a sleek, modern dashboard. Specific KPI cards for Sales, Inventory, and Member Engagement light up sequentially. Dynamic charts update in real-time.

scenes.title: Talk-to-Data AI
scenes.subtitle: Ask natural questions, get smart answers.
scenes.caption: Uncover root causes, forecast trends, and get actionable strategies.
scenes.veo_action_cue: Close-up on a conversational AI interface. A question like 'Why did frozen food sales drop last quarter?' is typed. An AI-generated textual answer appears below, accompanied by a diagnostic chart.

scenes.title: Empower Your Growth
scenes.subtitle: Faster, smarter decisions. Sustained business growth.
scenes.caption: Drive efficiency and achieve sustained growth with data-driven strategies.
scenes.veo_action_cue: Animate several positive growth charts and graphs. A unified dashboard view glows with success. Camera orbits around the vibrant, data-rich interface, symbolizing overall triumph.
